# REAL ESTATE PREDICTION ENGINE

## Project Report

---

*Predicting and Reducing Customer Attrition Using Machine Learning*

| Field                     | Details                                          |
|---------------------------|--------------------------------------------------|
| Student Name(s):          | Brice Nelson                                     |
| Student Number(s):        | 6084980121                                       |
| Program:                  | Post Graduate Program in Data Science & Gen AI   |
| Module:                   | Internship Program                               |
| Lecturer:                 | Desmond                                          |
| Submission Date:          | XXXXXXXX 2026                                    |
| Academic Year:            | 2026                                             |
